_comment: R1b moral-identity META-MODERATION fixture (§19.5). SUPPORTED/NEGATIVE cohort: a more internalized moral identity predicts a SMALLER over-claim gap (upper 95% CI of corr(internalization, gap) < 0). internalization rides the identity channel; gap rides session + card_sort — INDEPENDENT, no algebraic identity. Synthetic; N=40. Seed BOOTSTRAP_SEED+34.
